_comment: 环境配置模板 — 新机器/新用户配置参考

optional_packages.tesseract: 系统安装 + pip install pytesseract
optional_packages.paddleocr: pip install paddleocr paddlepaddle (中文OCR增强)
optional_packages.docling: pip install docling (复杂PDF版面分析)

setup_commands: pip install pymupdf4llm pymupdf pypdf pdfplumber easyocr markitdown reportlab python-docx networkx
python -m knowledge_graph build  # 首次使用需构建KG
python -c 'from pdf_ingest.quality_report import assess_quality; print("pdf_ingest OK")'
